explanation: If both nodes exist, sum their values and recursively merge subtrees. If only one exists, return that node. If neither, return null.
answer:
def mergeTrees(t1, t2):
    if not t1: return t2
    if not t2: return t1
    t1.val += t2.val
    t1.left = self.mergeTrees(t1.left, t2.left)
    t1.right = self.mergeTrees(t1.right, t2.right)
    return t1
